title: Note du dépositaire - ouverture à la signature

pages.text:
N

Ambassade de France

Aux Etats - Unis

JUN 1 1 1952

Dander. 330.

The Secretary of State presents his compliments to

Their Excellencies and Messieurs the Chiefs of Mission of the Governments signatory to the Treaty of Peace with

Japan, signed at San Francisco on September 8, 1951, and has the honor to refer to his notes of February 12 and

March 12, 1952 regarding an Agreement for the Settlement of Disputes Arising under Article 15(a) of the Treaty of

Peace. The aforementioned Agreement will be opened for signature on Thursday, June 12, 1952, and thereafter, in

Room 1078, State Annex 4. Appointments may be made for signing this Agreement by telephoning Republic 5600, extension 2307.

Department of State,

Washington, June 10, 1952.

٢٠٢٥
